case_title: LAXAMANA, ALEXANDER et al vs. AVIS RENT-A-CAR SYSTEMS, INC et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAXAMANA, ALEXANDER LAXAMANA, CARMEN AS TO DEFENDANT AVIS RENT-A-CAR SYSTEMS, INC PV HOLDING CORPORATION MANOR MANUEL SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-10-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-12-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-21-1993

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-07-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-07-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR NOV-09-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-26-1994, DISMISSAL
